# Let's open the uploaded file and inspect its content and length
path = "/mnt/data/file-8Eddqa2RJBo9LNbWSiFsVQ-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:1000]

import re, json, textwrap

path = "/mnt/data/file-8Eddqa2RJBo9LNbWSiFsVQ-text_to_analyse.txt"
text = open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8").read()

patterns = [
    "لا يأتيه الباطل من بين يديه ولا من خلفه",
    "وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا",
    "وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنْ الْقُرْآنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَاءٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلا يَزِيدُ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارًا",
    "فَاسْأَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ",
]

matches = []
for pat in patterns:
    for m in re.finditer(re.escape(pat), text):
        matches.append((m.start(), m.end(), pat))

# Sort by start index
matches_sorted = sorted(matches)
len(matches_sorted), matches_sorted[:10]

for m in re.finditer(re.escape(patterns[3]), text):
    print(m.start(), m.end(), text[m.start():m.end()])
